title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Dedicated Freight Corridor
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dedicated Freight Corridor family as a Logistics Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!
